instruction: Restore the blue progress bar on the video camera icon to where it should be. (very subtle — only 3px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/video-camera.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m15.75 10.5 4.72-4.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.28.53v11.38a.75.75 0 0 1-1.28.53l-4.72-4.72M4.5 18.75h9a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25v-9a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25h-9A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 7.5v9a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Z"/></g>
  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="13" y="110" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />

  <rect id="bar" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="110" width="96" height="6" />
</svg>
